# Autom8ion Lab

> Veteran-owned engineering firm building custom AI, automation, and software for compliance-driven industries: construction, healthcare, finance, real estate, US federal/state/local government, and the Defense Industrial Base.

Autom8ion Lab — operated by Sitehues Media Inc. — builds AI agents, workflow automation, and custom software for environments where security architecture and compliance documentation must be engineered from day one. We work inside CMMC, NIST 800-171, HIPAA, SOC 2, FCRA, HUD, and FedRAMP environments. Most engagements ship in 8–14 weeks; CMMC remediation runs 4–9 months; FedRAMP-aligned builds run 6+ months.

## Core Services

- [AI-Powered Enterprise Software & Applications](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/software-development): Custom platforms, internal tools, mobile apps, and customer-facing applications with AI integrated where it creates real leverage. Security architecture engineered from day one.
- [Workflow & Process Automation](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/workflow-automation): Custom workflow automation, AI agents, and process automation deployed where SaaS tools cannot go — on-premises, private cloud, and FedRAMP-aligned environments.
- [Cybersecurity Compliance & Engineering](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cybersecurity): CMMC readiness, NIST 800-171 implementation, HIPAA technical safeguards, SOC 2 Type II preparation. We engineer compliant systems and document them for audit. We are not a CMMC RPO or C3PAO; we work alongside your assessor or a partner C3PAO.

## Adjacent Capabilities

- [AI Agent Development for Regulated Environments](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/ai-agent-development)
- [Custom LLM Systems for Sensitive Data Environments](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/custom-llm-systems)
- [Custom API Integrations for Compliance-Heavy Stacks](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/api-integrations)
- [Cloud Infrastructure for FedRAMP, CMMC & HIPAA Workloads](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cloud-systems)

## Industries Served

- [Construction](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/construction): Project management automation, AI for takeoff and plan review, custom field apps, accounting and PM integrations for mid-market and specialty contractors.
- [Healthcare & Life Sciences](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-compliant software, AI for clinical and operational workflows, EHR integrations (Epic, Cerner, Athena), FDA 21 CFR Part 11 systems.
- [Finance](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/finance): SOC 2 and PCI-DSS-aligned platforms, AI for underwriting and fraud, core banking integrations (Fiserv, Jack Henry, FIS) for community banks, credit unions, fintech, and insurers.
- [Real Estate & Property Management](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/real-estate-property): Property management automation, FCRA-compliant tenant screening, lease lifecycle, HUD compliance, AI document review.
- [US Federal, State & Local Government](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/government): Custom software, AI, and automation for civilian agencies, state government, and municipal IT. FedRAMP, FISMA, NIST 800-53, StateRAMP-aligned.
- [Defense Industrial Base](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/defense): CMMC 2.0 readiness, NIST 800-171 implementation, custom development for DoD primes and subcontractors. November 2026 Phase 2 deadline.

## Compliance Frameworks We Build To

CMMC 2.0 (Levels 1–3) · NIST 800-171 Rev 2 · NIST 800-53 · FedRAMP Moderate / High · HIPAA / HITECH · FDA 21 CFR Part 11 · SOC 2 Type II · PCI-DSS · FCRA · HUD (50059, MOR, EIV, REAC) · FFIEC · Section 508

## Federal Contracting Registrations

- Legal Name: Sitehues Media Inc. (DBA Autom8ion Lab)
- Type: Veteran-Owned Small Business; SDVOSB certification pending
- DUNS: 05-289-2750
- UEI: YY2DR3KSENH7
- CAGE / NCAGE: 9YCS7
- Recommended NAICS primaries: 541511, 541512, 541519, 541611, 541690

## Engagement Models

We scope work to your contract structure — single-system task orders, multi-year IDIQ and BPA arrangements, fixed-price commercial engagements, time-and-materials advisory work, or commercial MSAs. Quotes are scope-driven and provided after a discovery call.

## Differentiators

- Software builders with in-house cybersecurity compliance arm
- Engineered for audit from day one — not retrofitted
- Veteran-owned (SDVOSB certification pending)
- Multi-vertical experience: construction, healthcare, finance, real estate, government, defense
- Founder-led: senior engineering access on every engagement

## Past Performance

Representative engagements include project management automation for a multi-state specialty construction firm (replacing manual reporting workflows across 40+ active projects), a HIPAA-aligned patient communication platform for a multi-specialty healthcare group, AI-powered document processing for a financial services firm, FCRA tenant screening automation for a multifamily property management company, and NIST 800-171 controls implementation for a DoD subcontractor pursuing CMMC Level 2 readiness. Many engagements are NDA-governed; details and references provided after a qualifying conversation.

## Company Information

- Founder: Sean Richard (https://www.linkedin.com/in/a8l-sean-richard/)
- US HQ: Plant City, FL
- Operations: Montreal, Quebec (development and operations only — sales geography is United States)
- Best fit: federal agencies, DoD primes and subcontractors, mid-market contractors, health systems and life-sciences companies, banks, fintechs, property managers, REITs
